summary: Iteration 14 testing for Stripe subscription monetization feature completed. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI tests passed. All 5 subscription tiers (Seedling, Sapling, Oak, Redwood, Elder Grove) rendering correctly with proper pricing, features, and button labels.
critical_code_review_comments: Subscription endpoints properly implemented with role-based access control (host-only for checkout/cancel)
SUBSCRIPTION_TIERS constant correctly defines all 5 tiers with pricing, features, and limits
Default tier (seedling) correctly returned when no active subscription exists
Elder Grove properly handled - returns 400 with 'Contact Sales' message on checkout attempt
Frontend SubscriptionPage.jsx has all required data-testid attributes for testing
Billing toggle correctly switches between monthly and annual pricing with ~15% annual discount
Plan cards show appropriate button labels: Current Plan, Upgrade, or Contact Sales
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create TEST_member_sub_* prefixed member user for permission testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscription feature fully tested. All 5 tiers with correct pricing: Seedling ($19/mo), Sapling ($49/mo), Oak ($79/mo), Redwood ($129/mo), Elder Grove (Custom/Contact Sales). Backend APIs: /api/subscriptions/plans, /api/subscriptions/current, /api/subscriptions/checkout, /api/subscriptions/checkout/status/{session_id}, /api/subscriptions/cancel, /api/subscriptions/feature-check/{feature_key} all working. Frontend renders all plan cards with billing toggle, feature lists, and correct button labels.

passed: GET /api/subscriptions/plans includes features and limits for each tier
GET /api/subscriptions/current returns tier info (defaults to seedling)
POST /api/subscriptions/checkout creates Stripe session and returns URL
POST /api/subscriptions/checkout works with annual billing cycle
GET /api/subscriptions/checkout/status/{session_id} returns status for valid session
POST /api/subscriptions/cancel returns 400 when no active subscription
Frontend: Subscription page renders with title 'Choose Your Plan'
Frontend: All 5 plan cards visible (seedling, sapling, oak, redwood, elder-grove)
Frontend: Billing toggle switches between Monthly and Annual
Frontend: Prices change correctly when billing cycle toggled
Frontend: Seedling shows 'Current Plan' badge (default tier)
Frontend: Elder Grove shows 'Contact Sales' button
Frontend: Oak card has 'Most Popular' badge
Frontend: Subscription nav link in sidebar
